prestazioni: Engine: BP-4W (1.8L DOHC 16V) with a forged internals build featuring Manley 86.5mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 12 psi on a custom tubular manifold by Racing Beat, with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and HKS SSQV blow-off valve.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 85W-140 GL-5 differential fluid, paired with a Fidanza 11lb lightweight flywheel and ACT 6-puck unsprung ceramic clutch. Transmission upgraded with PPG straight-cut gears (1st: 3.166, 2nd: 2.052, 3rd: 1.444) and a Quaife ATB differential for the 6-speed conversion.

Suspension & Braking: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (22-way adjustable damping) with Eibach ERS 800lb/in springs, poly bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5111G), and Racing Beat front sway bar (19mm solid). Braking system features Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers with 280mm slotted rotors (front) and 2-piston calipers with 260mm rotors (rear), using Hawk HT-10 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 NB widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hardtop and a custom vented hood (carbon fiber, 30% weight reduction). Front bumper modified with a custom splitter by Garage Vary (3D-printed ABS, 3-stage adjustable).

Aero: Cusco rear wing (Type II, 1500mm width, 3D carbon fiber) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals, with a custom diffuser by Autozkin (3-piece, carbon fiber, 20mm ground clearance). Side skirts replaced with Garage Vary NB-specific units (carbon fiber, integrated LED turn signals).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, 12kg each) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom aluminum shift knob (Mazdaspeed NB-specific, 6-speed pattern). Full custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports (8-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bars and fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360).
